name: Hello View
summary: A minimal Hello View for Locus.

summaryI18n.en: A minimal Hello View for Locus.
summaryI18n.zh: 一个最小化的 Locus Hello View。

author: r1n7aro
description: Hello View is a minimal Locus View plugin that displays a simple ready status panel. It is intended as a lightweight registry test package.

descriptionI18n.en: Hello View is a minimal Locus View plugin that displays a simple ready status panel. It is intended as a lightweight registry test package.
descriptionI18n.zh: Hello View 是一个最小化的 Locus View 插件，用于显示简单的就绪状态面板，作为轻量级注册表测试包。
